sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I can see the green is now above the center structure, and there's a box to its left (with blue center). Let me check the current state to see if the box turned G.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Green/White:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'W'):
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

print("\nBoxes:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ('c', 'G') and n['pixels'] == 12:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
